from celery import shared_task
from myapp.tasks import fetch_user_data, compute_metrics


@shared_task
def aggregate_user_report(user_id):
    user_result = fetch_user_data.delay(user_id)
    user = user_result.get(timeout=30)

    metrics_result = compute_metrics.delay(user_id)
    metrics = metrics_result.get(timeout=60)

    return {"user": user, "metrics": metrics}


@shared_task
def sync_order_processing(order_id):
    from myapp.tasks import validate_payment, update_inventory

    payment_result = validate_payment.delay(order_id)
    payment = payment_result.get()

    if payment["status"] == "success":
        inventory_result = update_inventory.delay(order_id)
        inventory = inventory_result.get(timeout=15)
        return {"order_id": order_id, "inventory": inventory}

    return {"order_id": order_id, "error": "payment failed"}
